title: Diamond Death
description: Exploring identity crisis and unrequited love.
lyrics: I know you never wanted any of this I know you think your life is just a suffer and a mistake I know you never wanted anything like this You don't know what you want until you see it in front of ya See yourself clearly, I betcha I know it's bewitchin' to be a witch, a witch which way you go I know it's bewitchin' bewitched to you, to be locked to you like wood glow I hate the way I feel now And my bewitched is a hero, which way, which way I hate this life I hate it all I wish I could just die and say it's done with me and it's for all Should've never loved me, can't never hate me, debate me, resurrect me Because you think you owe me something but you don't let me die here, I'm ghost Ghost to ghost to ghost to ghost and we know that I'm just a ghost inside my own skin Not worthy of you in the end, my friend You should hate me, bewitch me, debate me, kill me, just doubt me Eat everything that I said I'd be that I'm not, yeah You should just end me, defend me, defeat me, conquer correctly I'll never see inside of you, you won't let me, now you'll just judge me and hate me, goodbye Lately I'm dead, lately I'm wrecking my own, lately I'm dead Am I dead or undead, a repeating history of lives inside the waves of daisies Lies inside me, do you hear that in the background, it's the old school Giving us a start, the guy should die here soon Then you'll be free from me ever again Making you dislike your reality

lyricsSegments.text: I know you never wanted any of this I know you think your life is just a suffer
and a mistake I know you never wanted anything like this
You don't know what you want until you see it in front of ya
See yourself clearly, I betcha I know it's bewitchin' to be a witch, a witch
which way you go I know it's bewitchin' bewitched to you, to
be locked to you like wood glow I hate the way I feel now
And my bewitched is a hero, which way, which way
I hate this life I hate it all
I wish I could just die and say it's done with me and it's for all
Should've never loved me, can't never hate me, debate me, resurrect me
Because you think you owe me something but you don't let me die here, I'm ghost
Ghost to ghost to ghost to ghost and we know that I'm just a ghost inside my own skin
Not worthy of you in the end, my friend
You should hate me, bewitch me, debate me, kill me, just doubt me
Eat everything that I said I'd be that I'm not, yeah
You should just end me, defend me, defeat me, conquer correctly
I'll never see inside of you, you won't let me, now you'll just judge me and hate me, goodbye
Lately I'm dead, lately I'm wrecking my own, lately I'm dead
Am I dead or undead, a repeating history of lives inside the waves of daisies
Lies inside me, do you hear that in the background, it's the old school
Giving us a start, the guy should die here soon
Then you'll be free from me ever again
Making you dislike your reality
